Our Product Range

Comprehensive Welding Automation Solutions

From robotic welding cells to custom SPM machines — end-to-end automation solutions for every industrial welding need.

🤖
View All →

Robotic Welding

Complete robotic welding cell solutions using Fanuc ARC Mate robots with full cell configurations, positioners, linear tracks, and safety systems.

Fanuc RobotsWelding CellsPositioners
⚙️
View All →

Welding SPM

Special Purpose Machines for high-volume welding automation – scaffolding, hydraulic cylinders, compressor tanks, submersible pumps, and more.

Scaffolding SPMHydraulic SPMCustom SPM
🔧
View All →

Welding Equipment

Industrial-grade welding automation equipment – turn tables, rotators, positioners, MagBOT & LineBOT carriages, column-and-boom manipulators.

Turn TablesRotatorsPositioners
🔩
View All →

Welding Accessories

High-quality welding automation accessories – oscillators, AVC units, water circulation, cold wire feeders, welding chucks, XY slides, and teach pendants.

OscillatorsAVC UnitsChucks

Why Choose Mantronix

India's Trusted Automation & Robotics Partner

With over 15 years of engineering excellence, Mantronix Solutions has delivered 500+ automation projects across India, helping manufacturers reduce costs and increase productivity.

End-to-End Automation

Complete turnkey automation solutions from design to commissioning.

Custom SPM Design

Bespoke Special Purpose Machines tailored to your exact production needs.

Quality Assured

All systems rigorously tested before dispatch with full documentation.
